profile.name: Gurnoor Kaur
profile.tagline: Aspiring SDE & AI Engineer — building production-ready automation systems and intelligent ML pipelines.
profile.bio: I am a Computer Science Engineer at Punjab Engineering College (graduating 2027) with a strong passion for building scalable software, automated pipelines, and machine learning applications. Proficient in Python, C++, AWS, and REST APIs, I focus on optimizing complex enterprise processes through automated, data-driven, and highly performant solutions.

experience.summary: Built and deployed two production AI automation systems — AVA (AI Slack agent) and GH-EMU-ACCESS (GitHub access bot) — within Cvent's Enterprise Services team using Python, AWS Lambda, and Slack Block Kit. Both projects were recognised at All-Hands Q1 2026 and received an A+ grade from my mentor.
highlights: Built AVA, an AI Slack agent with a GPT-4o 5-way intent router dispatching to OpenAI, Glean (enterprise search), and Microsoft Graph (room availability), plus a reversible weekly Zoom license audit via EventBridge — recognised at Enterprise Services All-Hands Q1 2026.

Engineered GH-EMU-ACCESS, a two-phase async Lambda workflow that reduced GitHub EMU access provisioning to a single Slack command with zero manual steps, using HMAC-SHA256 verification and Okta workflow triggers.
Maintained the #help-glean support channel for 1,200+ members, resolving 60+ Glean tickets across OAuth, Slack actions, and data-source indexing.
Applied least-privilege IAM roles, environment-driven secrets, and HMAC-SHA256 signature verification across all production serverless services.

experience.summary: Selected from thousands of applicants nationwide for Amazon's highly competitive Machine Learning Summer School, studying industry-grade deep learning curricula.
highlights: One of a small national cohort selected through a highly competitive application process spanning thousands of CS applicants across India.
Completed an intensive curriculum covering Supervised & Unsupervised Learning, DNNs, Generative AI & LLMs, Dimensionality Reduction, Reinforcement Learning, and Causal Inference.
Engaged directly with Amazon Scientists in live Q&A sessions, translating research-level ML theory into applied engineering concepts.

projects.title: AVA — AI Slack Agent
projects.subtitle: Serverless AI Agent for AV Support at Cvent
projects.description: Built AVA, an AI-powered Slack agent for Cvent's AV team. Features a GPT-4o 5-way intent router dispatching to OpenAI (general), Glean (enterprise knowledge), and Microsoft Graph (live room availability), plus 7 slash commands and a reversible weekly Zoom license audit (EventBridge cron, S3-backed audit logs with downgrade/undo/whitelist controls). Recognised at Enterprise Services All-Hands Q1 2026.

projects.title: GH-EMU-ACCESS
projects.subtitle: Secure GitHub Enterprise Access Automation
projects.description: Engineered a secure Slack-to-Lambda workflow at Cvent that auto-provisions authorised users into GitHub Enterprise Managed Users (EMU) via Okta. A two-phase async Lambda pattern returns an instant Slack acknowledgement within the 3-second deadline while completing downstream Okta provisioning asynchronously — reducing a multi-step manual process to a single slash command with zero manual steps. Uses HMAC-SHA256 Slack signature verification, allowlist-based authorization, and CloudWatch audit logging.

projects.title: AWS Price List Visualizer
projects.subtitle: Automated Cloud Dataset Visualizer
projects.description: Built a full-stack system designed to automate extraction and real-time visualization of large AWS pricing datasets across 200+ services, reducing analysis time by ~87% (from 15 to under 2 minutes).

projects.title: Chat with PDF AI (RAG Pipeline)
projects.subtitle: Intelligent Context-Aware Query System
projects.description: Built a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline featuring document chunking and vector databases (FAISS / Chroma) for context-aware querying of 100+ PDF documents, cutting search time by ~80%.

education.school: Punjab Engineering College (Deemed to be University), Chandigarh

achievements.title: Amazon ML Summer School Selection
achievements.description: Selected from thousands of applicants nationwide for Amazon's highly competitive Machine Learning Summer School, demonstrating strong foundational ML capabilities.

achievements.title: Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera)
achievements.description: Successfully completed the multi-course specialization covering Neural Networks, Hyperparameter Tuning, Structuring ML Projects, and Convolutional Neural Networks.

achievements.title: PEC ACM Board Member Appointment
achievements.description: Appointed to the Executive Board of the Punjab Engineering College ACM Student Chapter, organizing national level hackathons and tech workshops.

achievements.title: Google GenAI Study Jams 2024
achievements.description: Successfully finished the intensive GenAI Study Jams and earned 15 verified Google developer Credly badges for cloud reasoning workflows.

achievements.title: Sub-Head at Women Empowerment Cell
achievements.description: Elected as Sub-Head at Punjab Engineering College's Women Empowerment Cell, coordinating logistics, creative initiatives, and community workshops.

achievements.title: Gen AI Academy Certificate (Hack2Skill)
achievements.description: Earned professional certification in Generative AI workflows, prompting engineering, and LLM agent automations.

blogs.title: Six Months Later — The Internship Ends
blogs.summary: The internship ended on July 10. I drove back to Jalandhar with my parents in the same Ertiga we came in. Six months of production AWS, AI agents, Cyberhub evenings, and learning what it actually means to ship real work. This is what I came back with.

blogs.title: Gurgaon, Day One
blogs.summary: Landed in Gurgaon with my family, unpacked a 1 RK in Sector 42, had homemade dinner on the floor, and watched the Aralias and Magnolias light up the night skyline. Office starts January 8th. Mom and Dad leave tomorrow.

blogs.title: I Got It — Cvent Internship Offer
blogs.summary: After months of rejections, back-to-back tests, and too many sleepless nights to count — I got the internship. AI & Automation Engineer Intern at Cvent. And it happened on my dad's birthday.

blogs.title: August Update — Semester 5 & The Internship Race
blogs.summary: Semester 4 wrapped with a 9.33 SGPA (CGPA 9.31). Semester 5 just kicked off — ToC, Soft Computing, DBMS, SE, and a Minor Project. Meanwhile, the internship hunt is very much on, and it's equal parts grind and anxiety.

blogs.title: AWS Pricelist Visualizer: My Brand New Project
blogs.summary: An in-depth look at my full-stack AWS Price List project designed to automate the extraction and real-time visualization of pricing datasets across 200+ cloud services.

blogs.title: June Update
blogs.summary: A review of my learning progression, research logs, and new projects completed in the first half of June 2025.

blogs.title: March Update
blogs.summary: Reflecting on engineering coursework, AI tool integrations, and goals for the mid-quarter SDE learning journey.

blogs.title: Completed Course 1
blogs.summary: Key insights, mathematical models, and programming tasks completed during Course 1 of the Coursera Deep Learning Specialization.

blogs.title: Started 'Deep Learning Specialization'
blogs.summary: Embarking on Andrew Ng's world-class neural networks specialization, exploring fundamental mathematics and deep weights tuning.

blogs.title: My First Website
blogs.summary: Building, optimizing, and deploying my very first personal website using Next.js, MDX blog engines, and serverless hosting.
